topPlaces.name: Thiruvetriyur (Ramanathapuram)
topPlaces.description: Thiruvetriyur is a Village in Tiruvadanai taluk, Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu in southern India. The place is famous for ancient Bagampriyal Kovil.

topPlaces.name: Karkathakudi
topPlaces.description: Karkathakudi is a small town and panchayat located in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu state, India. The villages under the panchayat of Karkathakudi are Siruvandal, Peruvandal, Melapanaiyur, Keelapanaiyur, Gudalur, and Karungudi.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvadanai
topPlaces.description: Tiruvadanai or Thiruvadanai is a town and a taluk headquarters of the Ramanathapuram district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is known for the Adhi Ratneswarar Temple and is mentioned in the Thevaram hymns.

topPlaces.name: Adhi Ratneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Adhi Ratneswarar Temple is a major Hindu temple with Shiva as the presiding deity, located in the town of Tiruvadanai in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Thiruvetriyur is a Village in Tiruvadanai taluk, Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu in southern India. The place is famous for ancient Bagampriyal Kovil.

Karkathakudi is a small town and panchayat located in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu state, India. The villages under the panchayat of Karkathakudi are Siruvandal, Peruvandal, Melapanaiyur, Keelapanaiyur, Gudalur, and Karungudi.

Tiruvadanai or Thiruvadanai is a town and a taluk headquarters of the Ramanathapuram district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is known for the Adhi Ratneswarar Temple and is mentioned in the Thevaram hymns.
The Adhi Ratneswarar Temple is a major Hindu temple with Shiva as the presiding deity, located in the town of Tiruvadanai in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (94 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur?
faq.a: Stays in Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vanmeekanathar Temple, Tiruvetriyur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvetriyur (Ramanathapuram), Karkathakudi, Tiruvadanai, Adhi Ratneswarar Temple.
